content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_CALL_RESULT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_CALL_RESULT]
( 
	[CallResultID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[CallResult] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Deferral] [int]  NULL,
	[Connected] [bit]  NULL,
	[Pitched] [bit]  NULL,
	[Positive] [bit]  NULL,
	[DialNextNumber] [bit]  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_CallResultID] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
